signals.author: confluence-status
signals.text:
# Weekly Status Update: Payments Modernization

**STATUS: 🟡 YELLOW** — Auth rate dropped to 62% (75% insufficient funds, not platform). Wave 1 scaling starts Monday with QASR UAE.

## KPIs
| Metric | Value | Target | Trend |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Auth Rate | 62% | 82%+ | ⬇️ (was 82.4%) |
| Hotels on Stack | 2 / 585 | 50 by Q2 | ➡️ (QASR Mon = 3) |
| Local Acquiring Markets | 0 / 6 | 6 by Q2 | ➡️ |

## Last Week Planned vs Completed
| Planned Item | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| SCALE-010: Migration tracker build | ❌ No progress | MUST complete next week |
| SCALE-020: Beta stabilization | ✅ Stabilized | Settlement bug appears solved |
| SCALE-030: Wave 1 kickoff | ✅ Started | QASR UAE going live Monday Feb 24 |
| FRAUD-010: CKO fraud addendum | ⏳ Waiting | CKO needs to send the addendum |
| AVC-010: NDA completion | ⏳ Partial | CKO NDA signed. AWX final version to sign |

## Workstream Status Summary
| # | Workstream | Status | This Week | Business Case |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | ORCH-001: Orchestration | 🟢 Complete | AMEX routing fix deployed | $2.23M per 1% auth |
| 2 | SCALE-001: Hotel Onboarding | 🟡 Yellow | QASR UAE Mon. Migration tracker slipped | Enables all value |
| 3 | OPERA-001: Opera Integration | 🟢 Green | Pre-read done. Deep dive March | $56K + $1.84M |
| 4 | FRAUD-001: Fraud & Decisioning | 🟡 Yellow | Waiting on CKO fraud addendum | $258K savings |
| 7 | AVC-001: AVC Onboarding | 🟡 Yellow | CKO NDA signed. AWX NDA pending | $550K / $80M |
| 8 | LAQ-001: Local Acquiring | 🟢 Green | UAE on track. Compliance approved | $1.84M / $84.7M |
| 10 | APM-001: Alt Payment Methods | 🟡 Yellow | PayPal MSA needs review. AMEX routing fixed | Conversion uplift |

## Next Week (Feb 24-28)
| Priority | Item | Owner | Workstream |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| P0 | QASR UAE go-live Monday | Brian | SCALE-030 |
| P0 | Complete migration tracker | Brian | SCALE-010 |
| P1 | Chase CKO for fraud addendum | Brian | FRAUD-010 |

## Risks / Blockers
| Risk | Severity | Impact | Mitigation | Age |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Auth rate at 62% — optics risk if reported without context | Medium | ExCom may question platform value | Segment decline reasons; 75% insufficient funds | New |
| SCALE-010 migration tracker slipped | Medium | Cannot plan Wave 1 cadence | P0 next week | New |
| D$ workshop still overdue | Low | Delays Phase 1 timeline | Juspay onsite first week of March | Carry-forward (3 weeks) |
